title: neolloydia clavata
intro: Neolloydia clavata, also known as the star cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neolloydia clavata include wound healing, anti-aging, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Neolloydia clavata can be made into tinctures, salves, and creams, which can be applied topically to the skin to harness its medicinal properties.
